---
title: "Fountain Diet Coke Map"
subtitle: "Crowd-sourced fountain Diet Coke locations in Santa Barbara"
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false

library(leaflet)

leaflet(elementId = "dc-map") |>
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) |>
  setView(lng = -119.80, lat = 34.43, zoom = 12)
```

<div id="map-loading">Loading locations...</div>

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  // Local CSV generated by scripts/geocode.R
  var csvUrl = "data/locations.csv";

  var loadingEl = document.getElementById("map-loading");

  // Wait for the leaflet htmlwidget to initialize
  var checkMap = setInterval(function() {
    var widget = HTMLWidgets.find("#dc-map");
    if (widget) {
      clearInterval(checkMap);
      var map = widget.getMap();
      loadLocations(map);
    }
  }, 100);

  function loadLocations(map) {
    fetch(csvUrl)
      .then(function(response) { return response.text(); })
      .then(function(csvText) {
        var results = Papa.parse(csvText, { header: true, skipEmptyLines: true });
        var locations = results.data;
        var markerCount = 0;

        // Group locations by business name (case-insensitive)
        var grouped = {};
        locations.forEach(function(row) {
          var lat = parseFloat(row.latitude);
          var lng = parseFloat(row.longitude);
          if (isNaN(lat) || isNaN(lng)) return;

          var key = (row.business_name || "").trim().toLowerCase();
          if (!grouped[key]) {
            grouped[key] = {
              business_name: row.business_name,
              address: row.address,
              city: row.city,
              lat: lat,
              lng: lng,
              entries: []
            };
          }
          grouped[key].entries.push(row);
          // If any entry is verified, mark the location as verified
          if ((row.consumed || "").toLowerCase() === "yes") {
            grouped[key].verified = true;
          }
        });

        // Create one marker per unique location
        Object.keys(grouped).forEach(function(key) {
          var loc = grouped[key];
          var verified = loc.verified || false;

          var verifiedBadge = verified
            ? '<span style="color: #c1440e; font-weight: bold;">&#10003; Verified</span>'
            : '<span style="color: #8e8e8e;">&#63; Unverified</span>';

          var popup = '<strong>' + escapeHtml(loc.business_name || "Unknown") + '</strong><br>' +
                      escapeHtml(loc.address || "") + '<br>' +
                      escapeHtml(loc.city || "") + '<br>' +
                      verifiedBadge;

          // Add each contributor's rating and review
          loc.entries.forEach(function(entry) {
            var hasReview = entry.review && entry.review.trim() && entry.review.trim() !== "NA";
            var hasRating = entry.rating && entry.rating.trim() && entry.rating.trim() !== "NA";
            var hasSubmitter = entry.submitter && entry.submitter.trim() && entry.submitter.trim() !== "NA";

            if (hasRating || hasReview) {
              popup += '<br><hr style="margin: 6px 0; border-color: #ddd;">';
              if (hasSubmitter) {
                popup += '<strong style="font-size: 12px;">' + escapeHtml(entry.submitter) + '</strong><br>';
              }
              if (hasRating) {
                popup += 'Rating: ' + escapeHtml(entry.rating) + '/5<br>';
              }
              if (hasReview) {
                popup += '<em>"' + escapeHtml(entry.review) + '"</em>';
              }
            }
          });

          L.circleMarker([loc.lat, loc.lng], {
            radius: 8,
            fillColor: verified ? '#c1440e' : '#a8a8a8',
            color: '#fff',
            weight: 2,
            opacity: 1,
            fillOpacity: 0.8
          }).addTo(map).bindPopup(popup, { maxHeight: 250 });

          markerCount++;
        });

        if (markerCount > 0) {
          loadingEl.style.display = "none";
        } else {
          loadingEl.innerHTML = "<em>No locations with coordinates found yet. Geocode your submissions by running the geocode.R script!</em>";
        }
      })
      .catch(function(err) {
        console.error("Error loading locations:", err);
        loadingEl.innerHTML = "<em>Could not load locations. Check the console for details.</em>";
      });
  }

  function escapeHtml(text) {
    var div = document.createElement('div');
    div.appendChild(document.createTextNode(text));
    return div.innerHTML;
  }
});
</script>
```

::: {.submit-cta}

### Know a spot with fountain Diet Coke?

Help us map it! Submit a location and we'll add it to the map.

[Submit a Location](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSep4UoqOil2V5x9Mxi1cqu_rlowAbNfmzpCryh0ZZQ1L4LlyQ/viewform){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg target="_blank"}

:::
